stage1.prompt: 选出 branch 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 树枝（复数 branches，加 -es 不是 -s）
learn.example: A bird is sitting on the branch.

stage1.prompt: 选出 root 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 根；根茎（注意发音和 route /ruːt/ 路线相同，但意思完全不同）
learn.example: The tree's roots grow deep into the soil.

stage1.prompt: 选出最合适的词（注意单复数）
stage1.q: The ___ of a tree absorb water from the soil.

learn.meaning: gram. absorb 是原形动词 → 主语必须是复数。root → roots；branch → branches（不是 branchs！）
learn.example: The roots absorb water. (The root absorbs water.)

stage1.prompt: 选出 wood 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 木；木头（wooden 是形容词
learn.example: The table is made of wood. → a wooden table

stage1.prompt: 选出 stick 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 棍；条（也可作动词
stick-stuck-stuck）
learn.example: He picked up a stick from the ground.

stage1.prompt: 选出 dig 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 掘（地）；凿（洞）；挖（土）— 过去式 dug，不是 digged！
learn.example: The dog is digging a hole in the garden.

learn.meaning: n. 洞；孔；坑（注意：whole /həʊl/ 意思是
，同音不同义）
learn.example: The rabbit lives in a hole under the tree.

stage1.q: The tree has many ___ and deep ___.

learn.meaning: gram. 以 -ch 结尾加 -es（branches）；以 -t 结尾直接加 -s（roots）。最常错的是写成 branchs。
learn.example: The tree has many branches and deep roots.

stage1.q: The dog ___ a deep hole yesterday.

learn.meaning: gram. dig 的过去式是 dug（不规则），不是 digged！类似 sing → sang，不是 singed。
learn.example: The dog dug a hole yesterday. (NOT: digged)

stage1.prompt: 选出 be made of 和 be made from 的区别
stage1.q: The chair is made ___ wood. (看得出是木头)

learn.meaning: phr. 看得出原料用 of，看不出用 from。The chair is made of wood.（看得出木头）Paper is made from wood.（看不出木头）
learn.example: The chair is made of wood. Paper is made from wood.

stage1.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（逐项检查）
stage1.q: 这棵树有粗壮的树枝和很深的根。
options: The tree has thick branch and deep root.
The tree has thick branches and deep roots.
The tree have thick branches and deep roots.
The tree has thick branchs and deep roots.

learn.meaning: gram. 三个易错点：①三单主语 The tree → has（不是 have）②树枝复数 branches（不是 branchs）③根复数 roots
learn.example: The tree has thick branches and deep roots.

options: The hole was digged by the dog with a stick.
The hole was dug by the dog with a stick.
The hole dug by the dog with a stick.
The dog digged the hole with a stick.

learn.meaning: gram. 被动语态 was + 过去分词；dig 的过去分词是 dug，不是 digged。选项 D 时态和动词形式都不对。
learn.example: The hole was dug by the dog. (NOT: was digged)

stage2.prompt: 选出 oxygen 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 氧；氧气（carbon dioxide 二氧化碳 CO₂）
learn.example: Trees produce oxygen for us to breathe.

stage2.prompt: 选出 create 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 创造（强调
地创新；make 偏
；produce 偏
learn.example: Trees help create a better environment.

stage2.prompt: 选出 environment 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 自然环境（注意：nature 偏
，environment 偏
learn.example: We should protect the environment.

stage2.prompt: 选出 take in 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 吸收；摄入（反义 give out 释放）。注意：take on 是
，take off 是
，容易混。
learn.example: Trees take in carbon dioxide and give out oxygen.

stage2.prompt: 选出 greenhouse gas 的正确翻译

learn.meaning: n. 温室气体（greenhouse 温室 + gas 气体；两个词组合，不是 greenhouse's gas）
learn.example: Carbon dioxide is a greenhouse gas.

stage2.prompt: 选出 human 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 人（复数 humans；human being 也是
，更正式）
learn.example: Humans need oxygen to live.

stage2.prompt: 选出正确的搭配（注意两个短语的方向）

learn.meaning: phr. 吸收 / 释放（一对反义词组）。give off 也是
但偏
，give out 偏
learn.example: Plants take in CO₂ and give out O₂.

stage2.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查每个词的语法）
stage2.q: 树木吸收温室气体并制造氧气供人类呼吸。
options: Trees take in greenhouse gas and create oxygen for human to breathe.
Trees take in greenhouse gases and create oxygen for humans to breathe.
Trees take in greenhouse gases and create oxygen for humans breathe.
Trees takes in greenhouse gases and creates oxygen for humans to breathe.

learn.word: humans / to breathe / 主谓一致
learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①gas → gases 复数②humans 复数③for + 名词 + to do（不能省 to）④主语 trees 复数，动词 take 和 create 用原形（不是 takes/creates）
learn.example: Trees create oxygen for humans to breathe.

stage2.prompt: 选出 come from 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 来自（be from 是
；come from 也可以是
learn.example: Most of our wood comes from trees.

stage2.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（注意固定搭配）
stage2.q: 首先，树木对环境非常重要。
options: To begin with, trees is very important for the environment.
To begin with, trees are very important to the environment.
To begin with, trees are very important for the environment.
To begin, trees are very important for the environment.

learn.meaning: gram. 三个易错点：①固定搭配 to begin with（三个词，不能省 with）②trees 复数 + are ③important for + 名词（对……重要），不是 important to！important to 后面接人。
learn.example: To begin with, trees are important for the environment. / Trees are important to us.

stage2.prompt: 选出 important 的正确介词搭配
stage2.q: The environment is very important ___ humans.

learn.meaning: phr. important to + 人（对某人重要），important for + 事物/事情。The environment is important to us. 但 It's important for the environment.
learn.example: Trees are important to humans. Trees are important for the ecosystem.

stage2.prompt: 选出 look around 的语境用法
stage2.q: When I entered the forest, I ___ and saw trees everywhere.

learn.meaning: phr. 环视；四下察看。look after 照顾，look for 寻找，look up 查阅。四者都常见，语境决定用哪个。
learn.example: I looked around and felt amazed by the forest.

stage3.prompt: 选出 convenient 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 便利的；方便的（注意：不说 sb is convenient，要说 sth is convenient for sb）
learn.example: Online shopping is very convenient.

stage3.prompt: 选出 furniture 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n.（可移动的）家具。重点：不可数名词！不说 furnitures，不说 a furniture。
learn.example: We bought some new furniture. (NOT: a furniture)

stage3.prompt: 选出 furniture 的正确量词搭配
stage3.q: There is ___ furniture in the room.

learn.meaning: gram. furniture 不可数 → 不用 many/a few/several → 用 some/much/a piece of。最常错的是 many furnitures。
learn.example: some furniture, a piece of furniture (NOT: a furniture)

stage3.prompt: 选出 product 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 产品；制品（produce v. 生产 → product n. 产品 → production n. 生产过程）
learn.example: Wood can be made into many products.

stage3.q: Paper is made ___ wood. (纸看不出木头的样子了)

learn.meaning: phr. 看不出原料 → from。看得出原料 → of。这是常考点。Paper from wood. Chair of wood.
learn.example: Paper is made from wood. The chair is made of wood.

stage3.prompt: 选出 borrow 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 借入（borrow sth from sb 向某人借入）。借出是 lend sb sth。容易搞反。
learn.example: Can I borrow your pen? (借入) / Can you lend me your pen? (借出)

stage3.prompt: 选出 side 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 一面（on the side of... 在……的一边）
learn.example: There is a door on the side of the house.

stage3.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查不可数名词和形容词形式）
stage3.q: 这家商店的木制家具很方便购买。
options: The shop's wood furniture are convenient to buy.
The shop's wooden furniture is convenient to buy.
The shops wooden furniture is convenient to buying.
The shop's wooden furnitures are convenient to buy.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①
用 wooden（不是 wood）②furniture 不可数 + is ③convenient to + 动词原形④shop's 要有所有格 's
learn.example: The shop's wooden furniture is convenient to buy.

stage3.prompt: 选出最合适的词（borrow 还是 lend？）
stage3.q: She ___ a book from the library yesterday.

learn.meaning: gram. 从图书馆借 → borrow from（借入）。lend 是借出，后面直接接人：lend sb sth。
learn.example: I borrowed a book from the library. / The library lent me a book.

stage3.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查每个词的准确性）
stage3.q: 例如，木制产品既美观又环保。
options: For example, wood products are both beautiful and environment-friendly.
For example, wooden products are both beautiful and environment-friendly.
For examples, wooden products are both beautiful and environmental-friendly.
For example, wooden product is both beautiful and environment-friendly.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①for example 不加 s ②
wooden ③环保的 environment-friendly（不是 environmental-friendly）④products 复数 + are
learn.example: For example, wooden products are environment-friendly.

stage3.prompt: 选出 for example 的用法
stage3.q: Many things come from trees. ___, paper and furniture.

learn.meaning: phr. For example, + 句子（有逗号）。such as + 名词（无逗号）。like + 名词（口语化）。
learn.example: For example, paper comes from trees. / Things such as paper come from trees.

stage3.prompt: 选出正确的句子（borrow vs lend）
stage3.q: Can you ___ me your ruler? I forgot ___.

learn.meaning: gram. lend sb sth 借给某人某物；mine = my ruler（名词性物主代词）。Can you lend me your ruler? I forgot mine.
learn.example: Can you lend me your pen? I forgot mine.

stage4.prompt: 选出 silent 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 不说话的；沉默的（偏
；quiet 偏
）。stay silent 保持沉默。
learn.example: He remained silent during the meeting.

stage4.prompt: 选出 overlook 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 忽略；未注意到（= miss = ignore）。也可指
（over + look 从上面看）。
learn.example: Don't overlook the small details.

stage4.prompt: 选出 communicate 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 交流；沟通（不及物动词！communicate with sb 与某人沟通。不说 communicate sb）
learn.example: We communicate with each other every day.

stage4.q: Trees can communicate ___ each other through roots.

learn.meaning: phr. communicate 是不及物动词，后必须加 with 再接人。不说 communicate sb，要说 communicate with sb。
learn.example: Trees can communicate with each other. (NOT: communicate each other)

stage4.prompt: 选出 knowledge 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 知识；学问。不可数名词！不说 a knowledge，不说 knowledges。
learn.example: Reading books increases our knowledge.

stage4.prompt: 选出 character 在本单元的意思

learn.meaning: n. 文字（本单元含义）→ Chinese characters 汉字。也可指性格/人物。
learn.example: Chinese characters have a long history.

stage4.prompt: 选出 spread 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 传播（过去式 spread，过去分词 spread，三形不变！不是 spreaded）
learn.example: News spread quickly through the village.

stage4.prompt: 选出 spread 的正确过去式

learn.meaning: gram. spread-spread-spread 三形相同。最常错的是写成 spreaded。类似 cut-cut-cut、put-put-put。
learn.example: The news spread fast yesterday. (NOT: spreaded)

stage4.prompt: 选出 translation 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 译文；翻译（translate v. 翻译 → translation n. 译文 → translator n. 译者）
learn.example: Can you read the English translation?

stage4.q: Trees can ___ with each other through roots.

learn.meaning: gram. 情态动词 can 后面用动词原形（communicate），不用 -ing 或 -ed。
learn.example: Trees can communicate with each other.

stage4.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查每个词）
stage4.q: 知识通过翻译和文字在世界各地传播。
options: Knowledge spreads around the world through translation and characters.
Knowledge spread around the world through translations and characters.
Knowledge spreads around the world through translations and character.
Knowledge is spreaded around the world through translations and characters.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①knowledge 不可数 + spreads（三单）②through 表
③translation 和 character 都用单数（泛指）④spread 不是 spreaded
learn.example: Knowledge spreads through books and translations.

stage4.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（注意不可数名词）
stage4.q: 不要忽略沉默的人，他们可能有很多知识。
options: Don't overlook the silent people — they may have many knowledge.
Don't overlook silent people — they may have much knowledge.
Don't overlooking silent people — they may have much knowledge.
Don't overlook silent people — they may have a knowledge.

learn.meaning: gram. 三个考点：①Don't + 动词原形（不是 overlooking）②knowledge 不可数，用 much，不是 many ③不说 a knowledge
learn.example: Don't overlook silent people. They may have much knowledge.

stage5.prompt: 选出 species 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 种；物种。单复数同形！one species → many species（不加 -s 或 -es）
learn.example: There are many species of trees in the forest.

stage5.prompt: 选出 accident 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 意外；偶然的事（by accident 偶然）。也可指
（car accident 车祸）。
learn.example: He found the treasure by accident.

stage5.prompt: 选出 by accident 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 偶然；意外地（= by chance，反义 on purpose 故意地）
learn.example: I met her by accident at the bookstore.

stage5.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查语序和搭配）
stage5.q: 据科学家所说，树木能通过根部互相交流。
options: According to scientists, trees can communicate with each other through roots.
According to scientists, trees can communicate with each other through their roots.
According to scientists, trees can communicat with each other through their roots.
According scientists, trees can communicate with each other through their roots.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①According to（必须加 to）②communicate with（必须加 with）③through roots（
，不用加 their 也正确，加了也对但第一个选项更精简）④can + 原形 communicate
learn.example: According to scientists, trees can communicate with each other through roots.

stage5.prompt: 选出 according to 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 据……所说（注意：according to 不能省略 to。不说 according the report）
learn.example: According to the report, the forest is growing.

stage5.prompt: 选出 treat 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 以……态度对待（treat sb well/badly）。也可指
learn.example: We should treat nature with respect.

stage5.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查搭配和词性）
stage5.q: 我们应该善待环境，而不是忽略它的重要性。
options: We should treat the environment good and not overlook its important.
We should treat the environment well and not overlook its importance.
We should treat the environment well and not overlooking its importance.
We should treat environment well and not overlook it's importance.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①treat...well（副词修饰动词，不是 good）②not overlook（动词原形，不是 overlooking）③importance 是名词（不是 important）④its 物主代词（不是 it's = it is）
learn.example: We should treat nature well and not overlook its importance.

stage5.prompt: 选出 look around 的语境用法
stage5.q: When I entered the forest, I ___ and saw beautiful trees everywhere.

learn.meaning: phr. 环顾——进入森林后四下看。不要和 look after（照顾）、look for（寻找）、look up（查阅）混淆。
learn.example: I looked around and felt the beauty of nature.

stage5.prompt: 选出语法正确的句子（陷阱题）
options: Look around, and you will see the beautiful environment created by trees.
Look around, and you'll see the beautiful environment created by trees.
Both A and B are correct.
Looking around, and you will see the beautiful environment created by trees.

learn.word: Both A and B are correct.
learn.meaning: gram. 祈使句 + and you will/can...是标准句型。you will = you'll 两者都正确。C 的 Looking 是分词，不能独立做主句。
learn.example: Look around, and you will see... = Look around, and you'll see...

stage5.prompt: 选出 call on 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 号召；动员（call on sb to do sth）。call sb 是打电话，call off 是取消。三者的区别是本单元考点。
learn.example: The teacher called on students to plant more trees.

stage5.prompt: 选出语法正确的句子（检查主谓一致和固定搭配）
options: According to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorbs CO₂.
According to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorb CO₂.
Accordings to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorb CO₂.
According the study, trees produce oxygen and absorb CO₂.

learn.meaning: gram. 四个考点：①According to（不加 s，必须加 to）②主语 trees 复数 → 动词 produce 和 absorb 都用原形（不是 produces/absorbs）③两者并列用 and，不用 comma
learn.example: According to the study, trees produce oxygen and absorb CO₂.

stage5.prompt: 选出 species 的正确用法
stage5.q: Many ___ of plants live in this forest.

learn.meaning: gram. species 单数和复数形式一样，不加 -s 或 -es。one species → many species。常错的写法：specie、specieses。
learn.example: one species → many species (NOT: specieses)
